entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: A multipurpose and nutritious grain legume crop cultivated for protein-rich seeds.

entities.name: SOUTH ASIA
entities.description: Region where pigeonpea is mainly cultivated.

entities.name: EASTERN AFRICA
entities.description: Region where pigeonpea is mainly cultivated.

entities.name: SOUTHERN AFRICA
entities.description: Region where pigeonpea is mainly cultivated.

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: Country where pigeonpea is cultivated and research is conducted.

entities.name: WILD CAJANUS SPECIES
entities.description: Novel source of genetic variations for the genetic upgradation of pigeonpea cultivars.

entities.name: CAJANUS CAJANIFOLIUS
entities.description: Wild Cajanus species used in crosses to derive introgression lines.

entities.name: CAJANUS ACUTIFOLIUS
entities.description: Wild Cajanus species used in crosses to derive introgression lines.

entities.name: INTROGRESSION LINES
entities.description: Lines derived from crosses between cultivated pigeonpea and wild Cajanus species.

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The productivity of the crop, including grain yield per plant.

entities.name: DAYS TO 50% FLOWER
entities.description: A phenological trait measuring the time to reach 50% flowering.

entities.name: DAYS TO MATURITY
entities.description: A phenological trait measuring the time to reach maturity.

entities.name: PLANT HEIGHT
entities.description: The vertical measurement of the plant.

entities.name: PRIMARY BRANCHES PER PLANT
entities.description: The number of primary branches on a single plant.

entities.name: PODS PER PLANT
entities.description: The number of pods produced per plant.

entities.name: POD WEIGHT PER PLANT
entities.description: The total weight of pods produced per plant.

entities.name: 100-SEED WEIGHT
entities.description: The weight of 100 seeds, used as an indicator of seed size.

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD PER PLANT
entities.description: The amount of grain produced by a single plant.

entities.name: REML ANALYSIS
entities.description: Restricted maximum likelihood analysis used to reveal genetic variations.

entities.name: AMMI ANALYSIS
entities.description: Additive main effects and multiplicative interaction analysis used to study environment and genotype interaction.

entities.name: ENVIRONMENT
entities.description: External factors that influence the variation in crop yield.

entities.name: GENOTYPE X ENVIRONMENT INTERACTION
entities.description: The interaction between the genetic makeup of the plant and the environment it is grown in.

entities.name: STERILITY MOSAIC DISEASES
entities.description: A disease to which some introgression lines showed complete resistance.

entities.name: FUSARIUM WILT
entities.description: A fungal disease to which some introgression lines showed complete resistance.

entities.name: YIELD STABILITY
entities.description: The consistency of yield across different environments.

entities.name: STRESS TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of the plant to withstand adverse environmental conditions.

entities.name: AICRP
entities.description: All India Coordinated Research Project on pigeonpea.

entities.name: INITIAL VARIETAL TRIALS
entities.description: Trials used for wider evaluation of high-yielding lines across agro-ecological zones.
